plan_summary: Find and replace the status bar text 'All systems operational' with 'Agent System Online' in the Dashboard component. This is a single-line string replacement task with no logic changes or new features.

files.description: Find the status bar element in the top right that displays 'All systems operational' and change the string to 'Agent System Online'. This is a simple text replacement in the JSX markup.

integration_notes: The Dashboard component is already imported and routed in App.js at /dashboard. No route changes, component additions, or backend modifications are needed. This is purely a frontend text update in the Dashboard.js file's status display element.
testing_instructions:
1. Start the frontend with 'npm start' (port 3000)
2. Log in to the application
3. Navigate to /dashboard
4. Look at the top right corner of the page where the status bar is displayed
5. Verify that it now shows 'Agent System Online' instead of 'All systems operational'
6. No functional behavior should change, only the displayed text
